All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

D

deck() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
Creates a horizontal metallic linear gradient for deck surfaces.
DECK - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Standard color tone for main weather decks and horizontal surfaces.
DECK_DARK - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Shading tone for recessed deck areas and lower walkways.
DECK_LIGHT - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Colors
Bright surface tone for elevated deck elements and raised walkways.
Destroyer - Class in com.example.battleship.model.ships
Represents a Destroyer ship in Battleship.
Destroyer(Orientation, List<Cell>) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.ships.Destroyer
Constructs a new Destroyer with the specified orientation and grid cells.
DESTROYER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.model.enums.ShipType
Destroyer, which occupies 2 grid cells.
destroyerHull() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.shapes.util.Gradients
Creates a simplified 3-stop vertical linear gradient for compact vessel hulls such as destroyers and frigates.
DestroyerShape - Class in com.example.battleship.view.shapes.ships
Utility factory for constructing the graphical 2D JavaFX representation of a Destroyer ship.
